top_signals.title: Gold Slips as Uncertainty Clouds Negotiations to End US-Iran War
top_signals.summary: Gold edged lower as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: White House unveils pared-back AI executive order
top_signals.summary: The order notes that federal access to the models should be subject to “appropriate confidentiality, cybersecurity, insider-risk, and intellectual-property protection, use, and nondisclosure requirements.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Paris sumo tournament should deepen existing ties and open up new frontiers
top_signals.summary: The upcoming Paris sumo exhibition is unlikely to match London's hype, but it may do more to expand its reach in Europe.

top_signals.title: U.S. Navy Selects HII USV to Advance to At-Sea Testing
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Navy has selected HII’s ROMULUS unmanned surface vessel to advance to the at-sea testing phase of the Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel (MUSV) program.Andy Green, executive vice president of HII and president of HII’s Mission Technologies division…
